title: The Blind Man and the Lame
lines: A Blind Man and a Lame Man were traveling together.
"I can see," said the Blind Man, "but my legs will not carry me far."
"I can walk," said the Lame Man, "but I cannot see the way."
They agreed to go together, the Blind Man carrying the Lame Man on his shoulders.
"Now," said the Lame Man, "I will be your eyes, and you will be my legs."
In this way they helped each other and got along very well.
moral: We are stronger when we work together.
